description.description: Defines the user-provided description for the response policy, which can be used for identification or documentation purposes.

gke_clusters.description: List of GKE clusters for which the DNS response policy will apply.

networks.description: List of VPC networks associated with the response policy, allowing DNS queries to be resolved based on this policy.

response_policy_name.description: Name of the DNS response policy to be created or managed; must be unique within the project.

timeouts.description: Configuration block to specify the timeout duration for creating, updating, or deleting the response policy.
